market_pulse: EDC Week dominates all major venues with high-talent lineups; LIV maintains competitive position with Tiësto and David Guetta anchoring weekend, but Zouk/OMNIA pulling stronger influencer amplification.

content_gaps.description: Competitors (Zouk, OMNIA, Hakkasan) consistently posting BTS pre-show prep and artist arrival content; LIV not leveraging this storytelling angle during EDC Week.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create BTS content series: soundcheck clips, artist meet-ups, VIP lounge previews during EDC Week residency. Post daily to Stories + Feed.

content_gaps.description: Encore Beach and TAO Beach using heavy UGC repost strategy; LIV relying more on official content. Competitor engagement 30-40% higher from guest posts.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch #LiveAtLIV hashtag campaign during EDC Week, repost top 3-5 guest videos daily, tag creators for organic reach expansion.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA, Zouk, and Hakkasan running heavy countdown mechanics (24h/12h/6h) with time-limited promo codes; LIV not using this scarcity driver.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Deploy countdown posts for Tiësto (Fri 5/15) and David Guetta (Mon 5/18) with early-access link + 10% discount code valid last 4 hours.

influencer_activity.mention: 179K follower XS/Encore promoter actively hyping EDC Week parties; recent posts targeting bottle-service demographics with group booking incentives.
591 likes on LIV Nightclub honest review; travel/Vegas content creator with strong influencer positioning — targeting guestlist-ready demographics.
Announced Palm Tree Club opening at MGM (May 2026) with 4,858 likes; strong Vegas nightlife authority with significant reach.

liv_outreach_targets.reason: Recent LIV review video reaching 591 likes; creator likely to amplify EDC Week content if offered exclusive access.
liv_outreach_targets.suggested_action: Invite to Tiësto night (5/15) with guestlist + bottle comp; request TikTok collaboration post.

story_activity.summary: EDC Week full lineup announced: Josh Baker B2B Kettama B2B Prospa (Wed 5/13), Dom Dolla (Thu 5/14), Tiësto (Fri 5/15), Four Color Zack (Sat 5/16), David Guetta (Mon 5/18).
Recent talent posts: Snoop Dogg (5/7), RL Grime (5/8), Lil Tunechi (5/9) during EDC Week activation.
Dayclub lineup posted: Follow The Fish TV (5/15), Rufus Du Sol DJ set (5/16), Martin Garrix (5/17) — direct competition for LIV's mid-week/weekend draw.
EDC Week daylife series: Porter Robinson, DJ Snake, Steve Aoki headlining pool parties — high-visibility dayclub positioning.
New luxury daylife venue at MGM by Tao Group x Kygo. 38 Instagram posts in soft-launch phase; Steve Aoki (Sun), DJ Lema (ongoing).
